title: Global citizenship and sustainable development education
subtitle: An index from 0 (worst) to 1 (best) measuring the extent to which global citizenship and sustainable development education are mainstreamed into different strands of education: national education policies, student assessment, teacher education, and education curricula.
caption:
Global citizenship and sustainable development education, 2020

An index from 0 (worst) to 1 (best) measuring the extent to which global citizenship and sustainable development education are mainstreamed into different strands of education: national education policies, student assessment, teacher education, and education curricula.

Four countries display their scores across four education strands in horizontal bars, with values ranging from 0.56 to 1.0. Colombia and India each record perfect scores of 1.0 in national education policies and student assessment; Colombia’s education curricula score 0.88 and teacher education 0.85, while India’s teacher education reaches 0.95 and education curricula 0.92. Malawi also achieves 1.0 in both national education policies and student assessment, with education curricula at 0.91 and teacher education at 0.90. Bulgaria shows lower integration across all strands: teacher education leads at 0.73, followed by student assessment at 0.71, education curricula at 0.65, and national education policies at 0.56 — the lowest single value visible on the chart. The highest scores cluster in national education policies and student assessment for three of the four countries, while teacher education and education curricula show more variation. Bulgaria’s bars are uniformly shorter than those of the other three nations, placing it in the bottom half of the visible range across every category. No country falls below 0.56 or exceeds 1.0. The most consistent pattern is that national education policies and student assessment receive equal top marks in Colombia, India, and Malawi, while Bulgaria lags behind in all areas without any strand reaching above 0.73.
